double cream: Evaporated milk + 1 tbsp butter per 100 ml
Crème fraîche (tangier, won't whip as stiffly)
single cream: Whole milk + 1 tbsp butter per 100 ml
Evaporated milk diluted with a little water
soured cream: Whole milk + 1 tsp lemon juice per 100 ml
buttermilk: 1 cup whole milk + 1 tbsp lemon juice or white vinegar (rest 5 min)
Plain yoghurt thinned with milk to pouring consistency
creme fraiche: Heavy cream + 1 tsp lemon juice per 100 ml, rested 30 min
butter: Coconut oil (tropical note in sweet bakes)
shallots: Red onion + ½ garlic clove (1 shallot ≈ 1 small red onion)
Yellow onion (milder if briefly soaked in cold water)
spring onions: Chives (use the green tops only, less bite)
garlic: Garlic powder (1 clove ≈ ⅛ tsp powder)
Asafoetida (a pinch, especially in Indian cooking)
ginger: Ground ginger (1 tsp fresh ≈ ¼ tsp ground)
lemon juice: White wine vinegar (¾ of the volume)
Apple cider vinegar diluted 1:1 with water
balsamic vinegar: Red wine vinegar + 1 tsp brown sugar per 2 tbsp
Sherry vinegar + a touch of honey
rice vinegar: Apple cider vinegar diluted 1:1 with water
white wine: Chicken or vegetable stock + 1 tsp lemon juice
White grape juice + a splash of vinegar
red wine: Pomegranate juice + a splash of red wine vinegar
fresh basil: Dried basil (use ⅓ of the fresh quantity)
fresh thyme: Dried thyme (1 tsp fresh ≈ ¼ tsp dried)
fresh mint: Dried mint (¼ of the fresh quantity)
garam masala: Curry powder + a pinch each of cinnamon and cardamom
Mild curry powder + a touch of black pepper
saffron: Pinch of turmeric (colour only, very different flavour)
caster sugar: Granulated sugar pulsed briefly in a blender
brown sugar: White sugar + 1 tbsp molasses per cup
icing sugar: Granulated sugar blended fine + 1 tbsp cornflour per cup
Caster sugar (won't dissolve smoothly into glazes)
chicken stock: Beef stock (deeper, less suited to delicate dishes)
beef stock: Vegetable stock + 1 tsp Marmite + ½ tsp Worcestershire
vegetable stock: Water + a pinch of MSG or Marmite
plain flour: Self-raising flour with the baking powder omitted from the recipe
cornflour: Plain flour (use 2x the volume; less glossy result)
fish sauce: Soy sauce + 1 anchovy fillet mashed in (per tbsp)
miso: Soy sauce (saltier, less sweet; use ⅔ the volume)
Marmite or Vegemite (very pungent; use a pinch)
mascarpone: Cream cheese + 2 tbsp double cream per 250 g
